hard_rules: A workflow may only load LoRAs whose family exactly matches the engine family or explicit compatibility alias.
Flux1, Flux2, SDXL, Pony-SDXL, SD1.5, SD3.5, Qwen-Image, Wan, HunyuanVideo, and LTX engines must not share latent/model objects directly.
Cross-engine transfer must use an image bridge: save output image, optionally mask/crop, load as image input, then run img2img/inpaint/edit workflow in the target engine.
The router must reject any checkpoint without sha256/hash metadata, base model family, source, storage location, and promotion status.
The router must reject any runtime lane without object_info node visibility, model path proof, model loading proof, output file proof, and QA manifest.
A disabled catalog node is not an active production model. Catalog nodes become usable only when selected through a compatible stack/profile and proven by runtime output.
